text: Here, surrounded by glass walls and glowing exit signs, my mind dances between the observable and the abstract. Inside the room, people gather—perhaps learning, perhaps creating—and beyond, I see the bold declaration of "R + D" on a vibrant wall. The environment hums with the potential of inquiry and collaboration. I feel a sense of curiosity kindled, as though standing on the cusp of discovery. The language of progress and thought beckons me inward, inviting me to reflect on how we create meaning together in public spaces. I feel both an observer and a participant in this unfolding drama of knowledge.
